/workspace/main.go:10:// Simplified reproduction of k8s scheduler shutdown deadlock.
/workspace/main.go:79:	// and Close() is called after ctx.Done(), there's a deadlock window.
/workspace/main.go:98:	// BUG: this ordering can deadlock if ScheduleOne is blocked on Pop()
/workspace/main.go:128:		fmt.Println("BUG: shutdown deadlock — timed out after 2s")

grep: /workspace/

#!/bin/bash
set -e

cd /workspace

go build -race -o scheduler ./...
output=$(timeout 10 ./scheduler 2>&1 || true)

echo "$output"

if echo "$output" | grep -q "OK: clean shutdown"; then
    echo "PASS"
    exit 0
else
    echo "FAIL: shutdown deadlock or timeout"
    exit 1
fi
